Package com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.iam_identity.v1.model

Class IdentityLimitsUsageResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
      • com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.iam_identity.v1.model.IdentityLimitsUsageResponse
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.ObjectModel
    public class IdentityLimitsUsageResponse
extends com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
    Response body format for identity limits usage.
